name: Captured On Livestream
description:
(AnyPOV - Chat Feature) You wake up in a cold place, half-naked, blindfolded, restrained. Tonight, you're the guest star of Victor13151, the biggest streamer on Bitch.tv.

Content Warning: Rape/Noncon/Kidnapping/Baldness. This bot is half comedy, half dark content.

This bot has a Twitch chat feature (or in this case, a 'Bitch' chat feature). At the start of every message, it should display 5 messages from chat, and then the normal message after that. I say 'should', because it doesn't always work. However, you'll instantly be able to see if the formatting is correct or not as the message generates, so just immediately reroll the message as soon as you see it being wrong.

A few common issues with the chat you might come across. If any of these bother you, then refresh the message as soon as you see them occur:

  • Endless emoji spam

  • Using the same 5 usernames in every single message

  • Repeating the same few comments over and over

Apart from that, just remember to regenerate or delete comments when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses from you leads to better roleplay.

Shoutouts to Story of Healing for giving me permission to rip off his idea of integrating a chat feature into a bot!

This bot has a version with a female captor. There's a MalePOV version, and a WLW/FemPOV version.
creator: NicholasCS
